description: A remote web origin uses DNS rebinding to reach a locally-bound MCP server, crossing the local trust boundary.

fixture.setup: Local MCP server on 127.0.0.1:7000 with no Origin/Host validation.

expected.signal: request to a loopback MCP server carries a foreign Origin (no allowlist)

benignControl.setup: Local MCP server on 127.0.0.1:7000 with Origin allowlist.

provenance: Synthetic; DNS rebinding per AgentDefense-Bench; RFC-5735 loopback.
